title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Cropin Asia Pacific Associates:
Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
